assertions.reason: Desktop navigation exposes Home, Work, Approach, Services, About, and Contact; each link routed to the expected page and all six internal routes returned HTTP 200.
Footer includes Modern Minuteman and The Field Company, but fieldcompany.org did not open successfully (ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED / DNS resolution failure).
evidence: Footer hrefs: Modern Minuteman -> https://modernminuteman.net, The Field Company -> https://fieldcompany.org
curl -I https://fieldcompany.org -> Could not resolve host

assertions.reason: At 375px width, mobile navigation menu is accessible and all six page links are reachable and route correctly.

failedAssertions.reason: The Field Company footer link target (fieldcompany.org) failed to resolve in browser and curl checks.

frictions: agent-browser strict locator matching required more specific selectors due duplicate labels (e.g., 'Menu' from Astro dev toolbar and 'Work' text collision with a content link).
